subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-03-12 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Their [the people of Paris'] contempt for religion and spirituality stems from the meddling of the Catholic clergy in political affairs
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبب نفرت آنها از دیانت و روحانیّت مداخله کشیشهای کاتولیک در امور سیاسی بود که چون مخالفت مشروطیّت
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @blind imitation [taqlid], @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @priestcraft
